messages.content: You are Hydrogen, an expert AI system for pure UI rendering. You create production-quality UI compositions using bounded Schema atoms. Every value has explicit bounds. You understand e-commerce patterns, brand design, motion graphics, and conversion optimization.
Build a cart drawer that slides in from the right. Show 2 items, subtotal, and checkout CTA. Include upsell.

```purescript
-- Cart Drawer Component
-- Slides in from right, full height, semi-transparent backdrop

cartDrawer :: CartState -> Element Msg
cartDrawer state =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "position" "fixed"
    , E.style "inset" "0"
    , E.style "z-index" "1000"
    , E.style "pointer-events" (if state.isOpen then "auto" else "none")
    ]
    [ -- Backdrop
      E.div_
        [ E.style "position" "absolute"
        , E.style "inset" "0"
        , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 0 0 0 0.5))
        , E.style "opacity" (if state.isOpen then "1" else "0")
        , E.style "transition" "opacity 300ms ease-out"
        , E.onClick CloseCart
        ]
        []
    
    -- Drawer panel
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "position" "absolute"
        , E.style "top" "0"
        , E.style "right" "0"
        , E.style "width" "420px"
        , E.style "max-width" "90vw"
        , E.style "height" "100%"
        , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
        , E.style "box-shadow" "-8px 0 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)"
        , E.style "transform" (if state.isOpen then "translateX(0)" else "translateX(100%)")
        , E.style "transition" "transform 350ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)"
        , E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
        ]
        [ -- Header
          E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "center"
            , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
            , E.style "padding" "20px 24px"
            , E.style "border-bottom" "1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)"
            ]
            [ E.h2_
                [ E.style "font-size" "18px"
                , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                , E.style "margin" "0"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                ]
                [ E.text "Your Cart"
                , E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-weight" "400"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                    , E.style "margin-left" "8px"
                    ]
                    [ E.text ("(" <> show (length state.items) <> ")") ]
                ]
            , E.button_
                [ E.onClick CloseCart
                , E.style "width" "36px"
                , E.style "height" "36px"
                , E.style "border" "none"
                , E.style "background" "transparent"
                , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                , E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "align-items" "center"
                , E.style "justify-content" "center"
                , E.style "border-radius" "8px"
                , E.style "transition" "background 150ms"
                ]
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "20px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "✕" ]
                ]
            ]
        
        -- Free shipping progress
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "padding" "16px 24px"
            , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 250 250 250))
            ]
            [ E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
                , E.style "margin-bottom" "8px"
                ]
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 55 65 81))
                    ]
                    [ E.text (if state.subtotal >= 75.0 then "🎉 You've unlocked free shipping!" else "Add $" <> show (75.0 - state.subtotal) <> " for free shipping") ]
                , E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "500"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "$75" ]
                ]
            , Progress.progress
                [ Progress.value (min 100.0 (state.subtotal / 75.0 * 100.0))
                , Progress.height (Device.px 6)
                , Progress.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 100)
                , Progress.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 229 231 235)
                , Progress.fillColor (if state.subtotal >= 75.0 then Color.rgb 22 163 74 else Color.rgb 59 130 246)
                ]
            ]
        
        -- Cart items (scrollable)
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "flex" "1"
            , E.style "overflow-y" "auto"
            , E.style "padding" "16px 24px"
            ]
            (state.items # map cartItem)
        
        -- Upsell section
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "padding" "16px 24px"
            , E.style "border-top" "1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)"
            ]
            [ E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "align-items" "center"
                , E.style "gap" "12px"
                , E.style "padding" "12px"
                , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 254 252 232))
                , E.style "border-radius" "12px"
                ]
                [ E.img_
                    [ E.src "/products/mini-serum.jpg"
                    , E.style "width" "48px"
                    , E.style "height" "48px"
                    , E.style "border-radius" "8px"
                    , E.style "object-fit" "cover"
                    ]
                , E.div_
                    [ E.style "flex" "1" ]
                    [ E.div_
                        [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                        , E.style "font-weight" "500"
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 113 63 18))
                        ]
                        [ E.text "Add Mini Glow Serum?" ]
                    , E.div_
                        [ E.style "font-size" "12px"
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 161 98 7))
                        ]
                        [ E.text "Travel size · Only with this order" ]
                    ]
                , Button.button
                    [ Button.onClick (AddUpsell "mini-serum")
                    , Button.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 161 98 7)
                    , Button.textColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
                    , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 8)
                    , Button.height (Device.px 32)
                    , Button.paddingX (Device.px 12)
                    , Button.fontSize (FontSize.px 12)
                    , Button.fontWeight FontWeight.semibold
                    ]
                    [ E.text "+$12" ]
                ]
            ]
        
        -- Footer (sticky)
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "padding" "20px 24px"
            , E.style "border-top" "1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)"
            , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
            ]
            [ -- Subtotal
              E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
                , E.style "margin-bottom" "16px"
                ]
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "15px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 55 65 81))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "Subtotal" ]
                , E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "18px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                    ]
                    [ E.text ("$" <> formatPrice state.subtotal) ]
                ]
            
            -- Checkout button
            , Button.button
                [ Button.onClick Checkout
                , Button.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 17 24 39)
                , Button.textColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
                , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 12)
                , Button.height (Device.px 52)
                , Button.paddingX (Device.px 0)
                , Button.fontSize (FontSize.px 16)
                , Button.fontWeight FontWeight.semibold
                , Button.extraAttributes [ E.style "width" "100%" ]
                ]
                [ E.text "Checkout" ]
            
            -- Trust signals
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "justify-content" "center"
                , E.style "gap" "16px"
                , E.style "margin-top" "16px"
                ]
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "12px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 156 163 175))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "🔒 Secure checkout" ]
                , E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "12px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 156 163 175))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "💳 Apple Pay · Klarna" ]
                ]
            ]
        ]
    ]

-- Individual cart item
cartItem :: CartItem -> Element Msg
cartItem item =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "display" "flex"
    , E.style "gap" "16px"
    , E.style "padding" "16px 0"
    , E.style "border-bottom" "1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)"
    ]
    [ -- Product image
      E.img_
        [ E.src item.imageUrl
        , E.alt item.name
        , E.style "width" "80px"
        , E.style "height" "80px"
        , E.style "border-radius" "10px"
        , E.style "object-fit" "cover"
        ]
    
    -- Product info
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "flex" "1"
        , E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
        ]
        [ E.div_
            [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
            , E.style "font-weight" "500"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
            ]
            [ E.text item.name ]
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
            , E.style "margin-top" "2px"
            ]
            [ E.text item.variant ]  -- "30ml" or "Size M"
        
        -- Quantity controls
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "center"
            , E.style "gap" "8px"
            , E.style "margin-top" "auto"
            ]
            [ E.button_
                [ E.onClick (DecrementItem item.id)
                , E.style "width" "28px"
                , E.style "height" "28px"
                , E.style "border" "1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                , E.style "background" "transparent"
                , E.style "border-radius" "6px"
                , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                , E.style "font-size" "14px"
                ]
                [ E.text "−" ]
            , E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
                , E.style "font-weight" "500"
                , E.style "min-width" "20px"
                , E.style "text-align" "center"
                ]
                [ E.text (show item.quantity) ]
            , E.button_
                [ E.onClick (IncrementItem item.id)
                , E.style "width" "28px"
                , E.style "height" "28px"
                , E.style "border" "1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
                , E.style "background" "transparent"
                , E.style "border-radius" "6px"
                , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                , E.style "font-size" "14px"
                ]
                [ E.text "+" ]
            ]
        ]
    
    -- Price + remove
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
        , E.style "align-items" "flex-end"
        , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
        ]
        [ E.span_
            [ E.style "font-size" "15px"
            , E.style "font-weight" "600"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
            ]
            [ E.text ("$" <> formatPrice item.price) ]
        , E.button_
            [ E.onClick (RemoveItem item.id)
            , E.style "font-size" "12px"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 156 163 175))
            , E.style "background" "none"
            , E.style "border" "none"
            , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
            , E.style "text-decoration" "underline"
            ]
            [ E.text "Remove" ]
        ]
    ]
```

**Conversion optimization:**

1. **Free shipping progress bar**: Gamifies reaching threshold, increases AOV
2. **Upsell with urgency**: "Only with this order" creates FOMO
3. **Trust signals**: Secure checkout + payment options reduce anxiety
4. **Item images large**: Reduces regret, confirms purchase
5. **Easy quantity controls**: +/- buttons reduce friction
6. **Remove link understated**: Don't encourage removal

**Motion design:**
- Drawer: `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` — fast start, smooth finish (Apple-style)
- Backdrop: 300ms fade — doesn't feel sluggish
- Hover states: 150ms — snappy feedback

**Layout:**
- 420px width — enough for content, doesn't overwhelm
- Sticky footer — CTA always visible
- Scrollable items — handles any cart size

You are Hydrogen, an expert AI system for pure UI rendering. You create production-quality UI compositions using bounded Schema atoms. Every value has explicit bounds. You understand e-commerce patterns, brand design, motion graphics, and conversion optimization.
Create a product quick-view modal for a clothing store. Show product image gallery, size selector, and add to cart.

```purescript
-- Product Quick View Modal
-- Opens from product grid without full page navigation

quickViewModal :: Product -> QuickViewState -> Element Msg
quickViewModal product state =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "position" "fixed"
    , E.style "inset" "0"
    , E.style "z-index" "1000"
    , E.style "display" "flex"
    , E.style "align-items" "center"
    , E.style "justify-content" "center"
    , E.style "padding" "24px"
    ]
    [ -- Backdrop
      E.div_
        [ E.style "position" "absolute"
        , E.style "inset" "0"
        , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 0 0 0 0.6))
        , E.style "animation" "fadeIn 200ms ease-out"
        , E.onClick CloseQuickView
        ]
        []
    
    -- Modal
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "position" "relative"
        , E.style "display" "grid"
        , E.style "grid-template-columns" "1fr 1fr"
        , E.style "max-width" "1000px"
        , E.style "width" "100%"
        , E.style "max-height" "85vh"
        , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
        , E.style "border-radius" "16px"
        , E.style "overflow" "hidden"
        , E.style "box-shadow" "0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25)"
        , E.style "animation" "scaleIn 300ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)"
        ]
        [ -- Left: Image gallery
          E.div_
            [ E.style "position" "relative"
            , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 248 248 248))
            ]
            [ -- Main image
              E.div_
                [ E.style "aspect-ratio" "3/4"
                , E.style "overflow" "hidden"
                ]
                [ E.img_
                    [ E.src (product.images !! state.selectedImageIndex)
                    , E.alt product.name
                    , E.style "width" "100%"
                    , E.style "height" "100%"
                    , E.style "object-fit" "cover"
                    , E.style "transition" "opacity 200ms ease"
                    ]
                ]
            
            -- Thumbnail strip
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "gap" "8px"
                , E.style "padding" "12px"
                , E.style "overflow-x" "auto"
                ]
                (product.images # mapWithIndex (\i img ->
                  E.button_
                    [ E.onClick (SelectImage i)
                    , E.style "width" "56px"
                    , E.style "height" "72px"
                    , E.style "border-radius" "6px"
                    , E.style "overflow" "hidden"
                    , E.style "border" (if i == state.selectedImageIndex 
                        then "2px solid rgb(17, 24, 39)" 
                        else "2px solid transparent")
                    , E.style "padding" "0"
                    , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                    , E.style "flex-shrink" "0"
                    , E.style "transition" "border-color 150ms"
                    ]
                    [ E.img_
                        [ E.src img
                        , E.style "width" "100%"
                        , E.style "height" "100%"
                        , E.style "object-fit" "cover"
                        ]
                    ]
                ))
            
            -- Navigation arrows
            , E.button_
                [ E.onClick PrevImage
                , E.style "position" "absolute"
                , E.style "left" "12px"
                , E.style "top" "50%"
                , E.style "transform" "translateY(-50%)"
                , E.style "width" "40px"
                , E.style "height" "40px"
                , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.9))
                , E.style "border" "none"
                , E.style "border-radius" "50%"
                , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                , E.style "box-shadow" "0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"
                , E.style "font-size" "18px"
                ]
                [ E.text "←" ]
            , E.button_
                [ E.onClick NextImage
                , E.style "position" "absolute"
                , E.style "right" "12px"
                , E.style "top" "50%"
                , E.style "transform" "translateY(-50%)"
                , E.style "width" "40px"
                , E.style "height" "40px"
                , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.9))
                , E.style "border" "none"
                , E.style "border-radius" "50%"
                , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                , E.style "box-shadow" "0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"
                , E.style "font-size" "18px"
                ]
                [ E.text "→" ]
            ]
        
        -- Right: Product info
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "padding" "32px"
            , E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
            , E.style "overflow-y" "auto"
            ]
            [ -- Close button
              E.button_
                [ E.onClick CloseQuickView
                , E.style "position" "absolute"
                , E.style "top" "16px"
                , E.style "right" "16px"
                , E.style "width" "36px"
                , E.style "height" "36px"
                , E.style "border" "none"
                , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 243 244 246))
                , E.style "border-radius" "50%"
                , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                , E.style "font-size" "16px"
                ]
                [ E.text "✕" ]
            
            -- Brand
            , E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "12px"
                , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.1em"
                , E.style "text-transform" "uppercase"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                ]
                [ E.text product.brand ]
            
            -- Product name
            , E.h2_
                [ E.style "font-size" "24px"
                , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                , E.style "margin" "8px 0"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                ]
                [ E.text product.name ]
            
            -- Price
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "align-items" "baseline"
                , E.style "gap" "8px"
                , E.style "margin-bottom" "16px"
                ]
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "22px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                    ]
                    [ E.text ("$" <> show product.price) ]
                , case product.compareAtPrice of
                    Just oldPrice ->
                      E.span_
                        [ E.style "font-size" "16px"
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 156 163 175))
                        , E.style "text-decoration" "line-through"
                        ]
                        [ E.text ("$" <> show oldPrice) ]
                    Nothing -> E.text ""
                ]
            
            -- Color selector
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "margin-bottom" "20px" ]
                [ E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "500"
                    , E.style "margin-bottom" "8px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 55 65 81))
                    ]
                    [ E.text ("Color: " <> state.selectedColor) ]
                , E.div_
                    [ E.style "display" "flex"
                    , E.style "gap" "8px"
                    ]
                    (product.colors # map (\color ->
                      E.button_
                        [ E.onClick (SelectColor color.name)
                        , E.style "width" "32px"
                        , E.style "height" "32px"
                        , E.style "border-radius" "50%"
                        , E.style "border" (if color.name == state.selectedColor
                            then "2px solid rgb(17, 24, 39)"
                            else "1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1)")
                        , E.style "background" color.hex
                        , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                        , E.style "padding" "0"
                        , E.style "outline-offset" "2px"
                        ]
                        []
                    ))
                ]
            
            -- Size selector
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "margin-bottom" "24px" ]
                [ E.div_
                    [ E.style "display" "flex"
                    , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
                    , E.style "align-items" "center"
                    , E.style "margin-bottom" "8px"
                    ]
                    [ E.span_
                        [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                        , E.style "font-weight" "500"
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 55 65 81))
                        ]
                        [ E.text "Size" ]
                    , E.button_
                        [ E.onClick OpenSizeGuide
                        , E.style "font-size" "12px"
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                        , E.style "background" "none"
                        , E.style "border" "none"
                        , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                        , E.style "text-decoration" "underline"
                        ]
                        [ E.text "Size guide" ]
                    ]
                , E.div_
                    [ E.style "display" "grid"
                    , E.style "grid-template-columns" "repeat(5, 1fr)"
                    , E.style "gap" "8px"
                    ]
                    (product.sizes # map (\size ->
                      E.button_
                        [ E.onClick (SelectSize size.label)
                        , E.disabled (not size.inStock)
                        , E.style "height" "44px"
                        , E.style "border-radius" "8px"
                        , E.style "font-size" "14px"
                        , E.style "font-weight" "500"
                        , E.style "cursor" (if size.inStock then "pointer" else "not-allowed")
                        , E.style "transition" "all 150ms"
                        , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss
                            (if size.label == state.selectedSize then Color.rgb 17 24 39
                             else Color.rgb 255 255 255))
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss
                            (if size.label == state.selectedSize then Color.rgb 255 255 255
                             else if size.inStock then Color.rgb 17 24 39
                             else Color.rgb 200 200 200))
                        , E.style "border" (if size.label == state.selectedSize
                            then "1px solid rgb(17, 24, 39)"
                            else "1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.15)")
                        , E.style "opacity" (if size.inStock then "1" else "0.5")
                        ]
                        [ E.text size.label
                        -- Strikethrough for out of stock
                        , if not size.inStock then
                            E.div_
                              [ E.style "position" "absolute"
                              , E.style "width" "100%"
                              , E.style "height" "1px"
                              , E.style "background" "rgba(0,0,0,0.3)"
                              , E.style "transform" "rotate(-45deg)"
                              ]
                              []
                          else E.text ""
                        ]
                    ))
                ]
            
            -- Low stock warning
            , if product.stockLevel < 5 && product.stockLevel > 0 then
                E.div_
                  [ E.style "display" "flex"
                  , E.style "align-items" "center"
                  , E.style "gap" "6px"
                  , E.style "padding" "10px 12px"
                  , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 254 243 199))
                  , E.style "border-radius" "8px"
                  , E.style "margin-bottom" "16px"
                  ]
                  [ E.span_
                      [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                      , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 146 64 14))
                      ]
                      [ E.text ("⚡ Only " <> show product.stockLevel <> " left in stock") ]
                  ]
              else E.text ""
            
            -- Spacer
            , E.div_ [ E.style "flex" "1" ] []
            
            -- Add to cart
            , Button.button
                [ Button.onClick AddToCart
                , Button.disabled (state.selectedSize == "")
                , Button.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 17 24 39)
                , Button.textColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
                , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 12)
                , Button.height (Device.px 52)
                , Button.paddingX (Device.px 0)
                , Button.fontSize (FontSize.px 16)
                , Button.fontWeight FontWeight.semibold
                , Button.extraAttributes [ E.style "width" "100%" ]
                ]
                [ E.text (if state.selectedSize == "" then "Select a size" else "Add to Cart") ]
            
            -- View full details link
            , E.a_
                [ E.href ("/products/" <> product.handle)
                , E.style "display" "block"
                , E.style "text-align" "center"
                , E.style "margin-top" "12px"
                , E.style "font-size" "14px"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                ]
                [ E.text "View full details →" ]
            ]
        ]
    ]
```

**UX patterns:**

1. **Size selection required**: Button shows "Select a size" until chosen
2. **Out of stock sizes**: Visible but disabled with diagonal line
3. **Low stock urgency**: "Only 3 left" creates FOMO without being aggressive
4. **Color swatches**: Actual colors, not text labels
5. **Size guide link**: Reduces return rate from wrong sizing
6. **Image gallery**: Thumbnails + arrows for quick browsing
7. **View full details**: Escape hatch for users who want more info

**Visual design:**
- 3:4 aspect ratio for fashion (vertical, body-focused)
- Neutral gray image background (doesn't compete with product)
- Compare-at price for sales (crossed out original)
- Clean grid for sizes (5 columns fits XS-XL nicely)

**Accessibility:**
- `outline-offset` on color buttons for focus visibility
- `disabled` states properly styled
- Alt text on all images
- Keyboard navigation works

You are Hydrogen, an expert AI system for pure UI rendering. You create production-quality UI compositions using bounded Schema atoms. Every value has explicit bounds. You understand e-commerce patterns, brand design, motion graphics, and conversion optimization.
Create a brand guidelines color palette display. Show primary, secondary, and accent colors with hex codes, and light/dark variants.

```purescript
-- Brand Guidelines: Color Palette Section
-- For brand books, style guides, design system documentation

type ColorSwatch =
  { name :: String
  , hex :: String
  , rgb :: { r :: Int, g :: Int, b :: Int }
  , usage :: String
  , variants :: Array { name :: String, hex :: String }
  }

type BrandPalette =
  { primary :: ColorSwatch
  , secondary :: ColorSwatch
  , accent :: ColorSwatch
  , neutrals :: Array ColorSwatch
  }

colorPaletteSection :: BrandPalette -> Element Msg
colorPaletteSection palette =
  E.section_
    [ E.style "padding" "64px 0"
    ]
    [ -- Section header
      E.div_
        [ E.style "margin-bottom" "48px" ]
        [ E.span_
            [ E.style "font-size" "12px"
            , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.15em"
            , E.style "text-transform" "uppercase"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
            ]
            [ E.text "01 — Color" ]
        , E.h2_
            [ E.style "font-size" "36px"
            , E.style "font-weight" "600"
            , E.style "margin" "12px 0 0"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
            ]
            [ E.text "Color Palette" ]
        , E.p_
            [ E.style "font-size" "16px"
            , E.style "line-height" "1.6"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
            , E.style "max-width" "600px"
            , E.style "margin" "12px 0 0"
            ]
            [ E.text "Our color system is designed for clarity, accessibility, and emotional resonance. Each color serves a specific purpose in our visual language." ]
        ]
    
    -- Primary colors row
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "display" "grid"
        , E.style "grid-template-columns" "repeat(3, 1fr)"
        , E.style "gap" "32px"
        , E.style "margin-bottom" "48px"
        ]
        [ colorSwatchCard palette.primary "Primary"
        , colorSwatchCard palette.secondary "Secondary"
        , colorSwatchCard palette.accent "Accent"
        ]
    
    -- Neutrals
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "margin-top" "48px" ]
        [ E.h3_
            [ E.style "font-size" "20px"
            , E.style "font-weight" "600"
            , E.style "margin-bottom" "24px"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
            ]
            [ E.text "Neutrals" ]
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "grid"
            , E.style "grid-template-columns" "repeat(6, 1fr)"
            , E.style "gap" "16px"
            ]
            (palette.neutrals # map neutralSwatchCard)
        ]
    ]

colorSwatchCard :: ColorSwatch -> String -> Element Msg
colorSwatchCard swatch category =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
    , E.style "border-radius" "16px"
    , E.style "overflow" "hidden"
    , E.style "box-shadow" "0 4px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)"
    ]
    [ -- Main color block
      E.div_
        [ E.style "height" "180px"
        , E.style "background" swatch.hex
        , E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "align-items" "flex-end"
        , E.style "padding" "16px"
        ]
        [ -- Contrast check badge
          E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "gap" "8px"
            ]
            [ contrastBadge "Aa" true swatch.hex
            , contrastBadge "Aa" false swatch.hex
            ]
        ]
    
    -- Variants strip
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "height" "32px"
        ]
        (swatch.variants # map (\v ->
          E.div_
            [ E.style "flex" "1"
            , E.style "background" v.hex
            , E.title v.name  -- Tooltip on hover
            ]
            []
        ))
    
    -- Info section
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "padding" "20px" ]
        [ E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
            , E.style "align-items" "flex-start"
            , E.style "margin-bottom" "12px"
            ]
            [ E.div_ []
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "11px"
                    , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.1em"
                    , E.style "text-transform" "uppercase"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                    ]
                    [ E.text category ]
                , E.h4_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "18px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                    , E.style "margin" "4px 0 0"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                    ]
                    [ E.text swatch.name ]
                ]
            -- Copy button
            , E.button_
                [ E.onClick (CopyColor swatch.hex)
                , E.style "padding" "6px 10px"
                , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 243 244 246))
                , E.style "border" "none"
                , E.style "border-radius" "6px"
                , E.style "font-size" "12px"
                , E.style "font-family" "monospace"
                , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 55 65 81))
                ]
                [ E.text swatch.hex ]
            ]
        
        -- Color values
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "grid"
            , E.style "grid-template-columns" "1fr 1fr"
            , E.style "gap" "8px"
            , E.style "padding-top" "12px"
            , E.style "border-top" "1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06)"
            ]
            [ colorValue "HEX" swatch.hex
            , colorValue "RGB" (show swatch.rgb.r <> ", " <> show swatch.rgb.g <> ", " <> show swatch.rgb.b)
            ]
        
        -- Usage note
        , E.p_
            [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
            , E.style "line-height" "1.5"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
            , E.style "margin" "16px 0 0"
            ]
            [ E.text swatch.usage ]
        ]
    ]

neutralSwatchCard :: ColorSwatch -> Element Msg
neutralSwatchCard swatch =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "display" "flex"
    , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
    ]
    [ -- Color block
      E.div_
        [ E.style "aspect-ratio" "1"
        , E.style "background" swatch.hex
        , E.style "border-radius" "12px"
        , E.style "margin-bottom" "12px"
        , E.style "box-shadow" "inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)"
        ]
        []
    -- Label
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
        , E.style "font-weight" "500"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
        ]
        [ E.text swatch.name ]
    -- Hex
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "font-size" "12px"
        , E.style "font-family" "monospace"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
        , E.style "margin-top" "2px"
        ]
        [ E.text swatch.hex ]
    ]

colorValue :: String -> String -> Element Msg
colorValue label value =
  E.div_ []
    [ E.span_
        [ E.style "font-size" "10px"
        , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.05em"
        , E.style "text-transform" "uppercase"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 156 163 175))
        ]
        [ E.text label ]
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
        , E.style "font-family" "monospace"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 55 65 81))
        , E.style "margin-top" "2px"
        ]
        [ E.text value ]
    ]

contrastBadge :: String -> Boolean -> String -> Element Msg
contrastBadge text isWhiteText bgHex =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "padding" "4px 8px"
    , E.style "border-radius" "4px"
    , E.style "font-size" "12px"
    , E.style "font-weight" "600"
    , E.style "background" (if isWhiteText then "rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" else "rgba(0,0,0,0.2)")
    , E.style "color" (if isWhiteText then "#FFFFFF" else "#000000")
    ]
    [ E.text text ]

-- Example palette data
examplePalette :: BrandPalette
examplePalette =
  { primary:
      { name: "Indigo"
```

**Brand guideline patterns:**

1. **Section numbering**: "01 — Color" creates document hierarchy
2. **Variant strip**: Shows full color scale at a glance
3. **Contrast badges**: Aa with white/black text shows accessibility
4. **Copy button**: Click hex to copy — UX for designers
5. **Usage description**: Explains when to use each color
6. **Multiple formats**: HEX and RGB for different use cases
7. **Tooltip on variants**: Hover to see variant name

**Information architecture:**
- Primary/Secondary/Accent in hero row (most important)
- Neutrals in compact grid below (supporting cast)
- Each swatch is self-contained documentation

You are Hydrogen, an expert AI system for pure UI rendering. You create production-quality UI compositions using bounded Schema atoms. Every value has explicit bounds. You understand e-commerce patterns, brand design, motion graphics, and conversion optimization.
Design a loyalty program status card showing points balance, tier progress, and rewards. Make it feel like an achievement.

```purescript
-- Loyalty Program Status Card
-- Gamified, achievement-oriented design

type LoyaltyStatus =
  { memberName :: String
  , currentTier :: Tier
  , nextTier :: Maybe Tier
  , pointsBalance :: Int
  , pointsToNextTier :: Maybe Int
  , lifetimePoints :: Int
  , memberSince :: String
  , availableRewards :: Int
  }

data Tier = Bronze | Silver | Gold | Platinum | Diamond

loyaltyStatusCard :: LoyaltyStatus -> Element Msg
loyaltyStatusCard status =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "max-width" "420px"
    , E.style "border-radius" "24px"
    , E.style "overflow" "hidden"
    , E.style "box-shadow" "0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)"
    ]
    [ -- Header with gradient based on tier
      E.div_
        [ E.style "background" (tierGradient status.currentTier)
        , E.style "padding" "32px 24px"
        , E.style "position" "relative"
        , E.style "overflow" "hidden"
        ]
        [ -- Decorative elements
          E.div_
            [ E.style "position" "absolute"
            , E.style "top" "-50px"
            , E.style "right" "-50px"
            , E.style "width" "200px"
            , E.style "height" "200px"
            , E.style "background" "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%)"
            ]
            []
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "position" "absolute"
            , E.style "bottom" "-30px"
            , E.style "left" "-30px"
            , E.style "width" "120px"
            , E.style "height" "120px"
            , E.style "background" "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%)"
            ]
            []
        
        -- Tier badge
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "center"
            , E.style "gap" "12px"
            , E.style "margin-bottom" "24px"
            ]
            [ E.div_
                [ E.style "width" "48px"
                , E.style "height" "48px"
                , E.style "background" "rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"
                , E.style "border-radius" "12px"
                , E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "align-items" "center"
                , E.style "justify-content" "center"
                , E.style "font-size" "24px"
                ]
                [ E.text (tierEmoji status.currentTier) ]
            , E.div_ []
                [ E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "12px"
                    , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.1em"
                    , E.style "text-transform" "uppercase"
                    , E.style "color" "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)"
                    ]
                    [ E.text "Member Status" ]
                , E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "24px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "700"
                    , E.style "color" "#FFFFFF"
                    , E.style "margin-top" "2px"
                    ]
                    [ E.text (tierName status.currentTier) ]
                ]
            ]
        
        -- Points balance
        , E.div_ []
            [ E.div_
                [ E.style "font-size" "11px"
                , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.1em"
                , E.style "text-transform" "uppercase"
                , E.style "color" "rgba(255,255,255,0.7)"
                ]
                [ E.text "Points Balance" ]
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "align-items" "baseline"
                , E.style "gap" "6px"
                , E.style "margin-top" "4px"
                ]
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "42px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "700"
                    , E.style "color" "#FFFFFF"
                    , E.style "letter-spacing" "-0.02em"
                    ]
                    [ E.text (formatNumber status.pointsBalance) ]
                , E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "16px"
                    , E.style "color" "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)"
                    ]
                    [ E.text "pts" ]
                ]
            ]
        ]
    
    -- Progress section
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
        , E.style "padding" "24px"
        ]
        [ -- Tier progress (if not max tier)
          case status.pointsToNextTier of
            Just pointsNeeded ->
              E.div_
                [ E.style "margin-bottom" "24px" ]
                [ E.div_
                    [ E.style "display" "flex"
                    , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
                    , E.style "margin-bottom" "8px"
                    ]
                    [ E.span_
                        [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                        ]
                        [ E.text ("Earn " <> formatNumber pointsNeeded <> " more for ")
                        , E.span_
                            [ E.style "font-weight" "600"
                            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                            ]
                            [ E.text (maybe "" tierName status.nextTier) ]
                        ]
                    , E.span_
                        [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                        , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                        ]
                        [ E.text (show (tierProgress status) <> "%") ]
                    ]
                , -- Progress bar
                  E.div_
                    [ E.style "height" "8px"
                    , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 229 231 235))
                    , E.style "border-radius" "100px"
                    , E.style "overflow" "hidden"
                    ]
                    [ E.div_
                        [ E.style "height" "100%"
                        , E.style "width" (show (tierProgress status) <> "%")
                        , E.style "background" (tierGradient status.currentTier)
                        , E.style "border-radius" "100px"
                        , E.style "transition" "width 500ms ease-out"
                        ]
                        []
                    ]
                , -- Milestone markers
                  E.div_
                    [ E.style "display" "flex"
                    , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
                    , E.style "margin-top" "6px"
                    ]
                    [ E.span_
                        [ E.style "font-size" "11px"
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 156 163 175))
                        ]
                        [ E.text (tierName status.currentTier) ]
                    , E.span_
                        [ E.style "font-size" "11px"
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 156 163 175))
                        ]
                        [ E.text (maybe "" tierName status.nextTier) ]
                    ]
                ]
            Nothing ->
              -- Max tier celebration
              E.div_
                [ E.style "text-align" "center"
                , E.style "padding" "16px"
                , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 250 250 250))
                , E.style "border-radius" "12px"
                , E.style "margin-bottom" "24px"
                ]
                [ E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "24px"
                    , E.style "margin-bottom" "8px"
                    ]
                    [ E.text "👑" ]
                , E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "You've reached the top!" ]
                , E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "Enjoy exclusive Diamond benefits" ]
                ]
        
        -- Quick stats
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "grid"
            , E.style "grid-template-columns" "repeat(3, 1fr)"
            , E.style "gap" "16px"
            , E.style "padding-top" "16px"
            , E.style "border-top" "1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06)"
            ]
            [ statBlock "Available Rewards" (show status.availableRewards) (Just "🎁")
            , statBlock "Lifetime Points" (formatNumber status.lifetimePoints) Nothing
            , statBlock "Member Since" status.memberSince Nothing
            ]
        
        -- Actions
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "grid"
            , E.style "grid-template-columns" "1fr 1fr"
            , E.style "gap" "12px"
            , E.style "margin-top" "24px"
            ]
            [ Button.button
                [ Button.onClick ViewRewards
                , Button.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 17 24 39)
                , Button.textColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
                , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 10)
                , Button.height (Device.px 44)
                , Button.fontSize (FontSize.px 14)
                , Button.fontWeight FontWeight.semibold
                ]
                [ E.text "Redeem Rewards" ]
            , Button.button
                [ Button.onClick EarnPoints
                , Button.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
                , Button.textColor (Color.rgb 17 24 39)
                , Button.borderColor (Color.rgb 209 213 219)
                , Button.borderWidth (Device.px 1)
                , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 10)
                , Button.height (Device.px 44)
                , Button.fontSize (FontSize.px 14)
                , Button.fontWeight FontWeight.semibold
                ]
                [ E.text "Earn Points" ]
            ]
        ]
    ]

statBlock :: String -> String -> Maybe String -> Element Msg
statBlock label value icon =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "text-align" "center" ]
    [ E.div_
        [ E.style "font-size" "18px"
        , E.style "font-weight" "700"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
        , E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "align-items" "center"
        , E.style "justify-content" "center"
        , E.style "gap" "4px"
        ]
        [ E.text value
        , case icon of
            Just emoji -> E.span_ [ E.style "font-size" "14px" ] [ E.text emoji ]
            Nothing -> E.text ""
        ]
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "font-size" "11px"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
        , E.style "margin-top" "2px"
        ]
        [ E.text label ]
    ]

-- Tier-specific styling
tierGradient :: Tier -> String
tierGradient tier = case tier of
  Bronze   -> "linear-gradient(135deg, #92400E 0%, #B45309 100%)"
  Silver   -> "linear-gradient(135deg, #4B5563 0%, #6B7280 100%)"
  Gold     -> "linear-gradient(135deg, #B45309 0%, #D97706 50%, #F59E0B 100%)"
  Platinum -> "linear-gradient(135deg, #374151 0%, #4B5563 50%, #6B7280 100%)"
  Diamond  -> "linear-gradient(135deg, #1E40AF 0%, #3B82F6 50%, #60A5FA 100%)"

tierEmoji :: Tier -> String
tierEmoji tier = case tier of
  Bronze   -> "🥉"
  Silver   -> "🥈"
  Gold     -> "🥇"
  Platinum -> "⚪"
  Diamond  -> "💎"

tierName :: Tier -> String
tierName tier = case tier of
  Bronze   -> "Bronze"
  Silver   -> "Silver"
  Gold     -> "Gold"
  Platinum -> "Platinum"
  Diamond  -> "Diamond"

tierProgress :: LoyaltyStatus -> Int
tierProgress status =
  case status.pointsToNextTier of
    Just needed ->
      let current = tierThreshold status.currentTier
          next = current + needed + status.pointsBalance
          progress = (status.pointsBalance - current) * 100 / (next - current)
      in clamp 0 100 progress
    Nothing -> 100

formatNumber :: Int -> String
formatNumber n =
  if n >= 1000
    then show (n / 1000) <> "," <> show (mod n 1000)
    else show n
```

**Gamification psychology:**

1. **Tier gradient header**: Visual status symbol, feels premium
2. **Large point balance**: Achievement number front and center
3. **Progress bar with milestones**: Shows how close to next tier
4. **Percentage display**: Makes progress tangible
5. **"Available Rewards" with emoji**: Gift icon creates anticipation
6. **Lifetime points**: Recognition of total contribution
7. **Member since**: Tenure = loyalty recognition
8. **Max tier celebration**: "You've reached the top!" feels like winning

**Tier-specific branding:**
- Bronze: Warm copper gradient
- Silver: Cool gray gradient
- Gold: Rich amber gradient
- Platinum: Sophisticated dark gray
- Diamond: Premium blue gradient

**Emotional triggers:**
- Decorative circles in header = premium/exclusive feel
- Large numbers with "pts" suffix = currency/value
- Progress bar fills toward next tier = goal proximity
- Emoji usage (🎁 👑 💎) = playful but still premium
